symptom_vector: Pod killed, forceful pod termination, container killed, pod eviction

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: Component [paymentservice-0] experienced [pod_processes] fault, accompanied by [client_error, client_error_ratio, error, error_ratio, request, response] anomalies.
reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [paymentservice-0] (From Ground Truth instance field)
Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [request] and [response] in Metric data (From GT key_observations metric keyword)
Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [pod_memory_working_set_bytes] in Metric data (From GT key_observations metric keyword)
Step 4: Check Observation - Found keyword [pod_processes] in Metric data (From GT key_observations metric keyword)
Step 5: Check Observation - Found keyword [frontend] and [shippingservice] in Trace data with request_proportion_anomalies (From GT key_observations trace keyword)
Step 6: Derive Root Cause - Based on above features, determined cause is [pod_processes] (From Ground Truth key_metrics)

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Value drops from normal to 0.0 indicating process termination
critical_checks.instruction: Check if metric [pod_processes] for paymentservice-0 shows value dropping to 0.0 during fault window

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Memory usage pattern changes during fault
critical_checks.instruction: Search for metric [pod_memory_working_set_bytes] for paymentservice-0 to detect memory anomalies

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Request rate anomalies during fault period
critical_checks.instruction: Check [request] metric for paymentservice-0 to identify request pattern changes

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Response pattern anomalies during fault period
critical_checks.instruction: Check [response] metric for paymentservice-0 to identify response pattern changes

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Request proportion anomalies involving frontend service
critical_checks.instruction: Search for trace anomalies with keyword [frontend] in request_proportion_anomalies
Search for trace anomalies with keyword [shippingservice] in request_proportion_anomalies
